experiment: DOMEX-CAT-S444 — FMEA refresh S441→S444 + 3 CRITICAL upgrades + FM-30 reclassification
method: FMEA audit: reviewed S441→S444 commits (10 commits, 3 sessions). Verified FM-02/FM-11/FM-04 upgrade implementation (check.sh + orient_checks.py). Discovered FM-30 already had 3 defense layers since S436 (periodic registration missed by S441 auditor). Audited NAT prediction status. Implemented low-effort upgrades for FM-02 (check.sh stat guard), FM-11 (orient.py genesis hash at session start), FM-04 (orient.py git index health). Updated periodics.json last_session for cascade-monitor.
expect: FMEA refresh S441→S444: 0-1 new FMs (NAT predicts S450-S465); upgrade FM-02/FM-11/FM-12 low-effort paths; FM-30 periodic upgrade status check
actual: 0 new FMs found (NAT prediction S450-S465 intact, 3 sessions elapsed since S441). 3 CRITICAL MINIMAL→ADEQUATE upgrades implemented: FM-02 (check.sh core-file stat guard), FM-11 (orient.py genesis hash at session start), FM-04 (orient.py git index health check). FM-30 reclassified MINIMAL→ADEQUATE — cascade-monitor periodic was already in periodics.json since S436 (S441 auditor overcounted layers as 2 instead of 3). ADEQUATE count 6→10. FM-12 (fork bomb) NOT upgraded — deprioritized vs implemented upgrades. FM-06/FM-03 remain highest-priority MINIMAL targets.
diff: Expected 0-1 new FMs — confirmed 0. Expected to implement FM-02/FM-11/FM-12 — did FM-02/FM-11 and FM-04 instead (FM-04 lower in S435 priority list but implementable in same session as FM-11 since both use orient_checks.py). FM-30 reclassification was unexpected — audit found S436 periodic pre-existing. Net: 4 ADEQUATE upgrades vs expected 3.

layers_after: check.sh FM-11 genesis hash at commit-time

FM-04.evidence: orient_checks.py check_git_index_health() added: verifies .git/index exists, >100 bytes, git status succeeds. Called from orient.py parallel pool. 1st automated enforced layer added. Swiss Cheese ADEQUATE.
layers_after: Rule: S426 recovery pattern documented in wsl-ops.md

FM-30.evidence: S441 claimed 2 defense layers (orient + check.sh). Audit found cascade-monitor in tools/periodics.json since S436 (cadence 5). Three independent automated layers = ADEQUATE. S441 error: periodics.json not checked during layer audit (L-1061).
